L2().details: Sets up the L2 contracts. Depends on `L1()` being called first.

disableUpgradedFork().details: Disables upgrade mode for testing. By default the fork testing env will be upgraded to the latest      implementation. This can be used to disable the upgrade which, is useful for tests targeting the upgrade      process itself.

enableAltDA().details: Enables alternative data availability mode for testing

returnIfForkTest(string).details: Returns early when running against a forked production network. Useful for allowing a portion of a test      to run.

setUp().details: Deploys either the Deploy.s.sol or Fork.s.sol contract, by fetching the bytecode dynamically using      `vm.getDeployedCode()` and etching it into the state.      This enables us to avoid including the bytecode of those contracts in the bytecode of this contract.      If the bytecode of those contracts was included in this contract, then it will double      the compile time and bloat all of the test contract artifacts since they      will also need to include the bytecode for the Deploy contract.      This is a hack as we are pushing solidity to the edge.

skipIfCoverage().details: Skips tests when running in coverage mode.

skipIfForkTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network.

skipIfOpsRepoTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network using the superchain ops repo.

testFuzz_depositTransaction_contract_suc.details: Tests that `depositTransaction` succeeds for a contract.

testFuzz_depositTransaction_eoa_succeeds.details: Tests that `depositTransaction` succeeds for an EOA.

testFuzz_depositTransaction_smallGasLimi.details: Tests that `depositTransaction` succeeds for small,      but sufficient, gas limits.

test_constructor_succeeds().details: Tests that the constructor sets the correct values.

test_depositTransaction_contractCreation.details: Tests that `depositTransaction` reverts when the destination address is non-zero      for a contract creation deposit.

test_depositTransaction_largeData_revert.details: Tests that `depositTransaction` reverts when the data is too large.      This places an upper bound on unsafe blocks sent over p2p.

test_depositTransaction_smallGasLimit_re.details: Tests that `depositTransaction` reverts when the gas limit is too small.

test_donateETH_succeeds(uint256).details: Tests that the donateETH function donates ETH and does no state read/write

test_initialize_succeeds().details: Tests that the initializer sets the correct values.

test_minimumGasLimit_succeeds().details: Tests that `minimumGasLimit` succeeds for small calldata sizes.      The gas limit should be 21k for 0 calldata and increase linearly      for larger calldata sizes.

test_pause_onlyGuardian_reverts().details: Tests that `pause` reverts when called by a non-GUARDIAN.

test_pause_succeeds().details: Tests that `pause` successfully pauses      when called by the GUARDIAN.

test_unpause_onlyGuardian_reverts().details: Tests that `unpause` reverts when called by a non-GUARDIAN.

test_unpause_succeeds().details: Tests that `unpause` successfully unpauses      when called by the GUARDIAN.

artifacts().notice: The address of the Artifacts contract. Set into state by Deployer.setUp() with `etch` to avoid         mutating any nonces. MUST not have constructor logic.

isForkTest().notice: Indicates whether a test is running against a forked production network.

test_constructor_succeeds().notice: Marked virtual to be overridden in         test/kontrol/deployment/DeploymentSummary.t.sol

test_initialize_succeeds().notice: Marked virtual to be overridden in         test/kontrol/deployment/DeploymentSummary.t.sol

test_version_succeeds().notice: Tests that the version function returns a valid string. We avoid testing the         specific value of the string as it changes frequently.
